# recordingFileColumn

**Instance Property**

The name of the column that contains the data files the activity classifier used during its training session.

## Declaration

```swift
var recordingFileColumn: String
```

## Discussion

This property reflects the name of the data table column or annotation file column the training session used to locate each activity’s data files.



Changing the value of this property doesn’t retrain the model or affect its behavior.

## Inspecting an activity classifier model

- **model**: The underlying Core ML model of the activity classifier stored in memory.
- **modelParameters**: The model configuration parameters the activity classifier used during its training session.
- **featureColumns**: The names of the feature columns the activity classifier used during its training session.
- **labelColumn**: The name of the label column the activity classifier used during its training session.
